text:
Market today: Mixed sentiment in tech. The chip sector is showing strength with positive news from SK Hynix, but the broader AI narrative is getting complicated by Apple's lawsuit against OpenAI. This creates some cross-currents for your tech-heavy book.

Your holdings: SOXL is down -24.46% and SPAL is down -27.71%. Both are leveraged ETFs, meaning drawdowns are amplified, especially on margin. Their decay also adds to the challenge. Keep a very close eye on their stops.

Watch: The impact of Apple's lawsuit on broader AI sentiment and any follow-through in the chip sector after SK Hynix's pop.

Bottom line: Manage your leveraged positions tightly while watching for clarity on AI and continued chip strength.
plays: SOXL: Respect your stop at 200. Given its decay and current -24.46% loss, consider if you want to adjust that stop tighter or trim.
SPAL: Your new leveraged position is down -27.71%. Stick to the 21.38 stop or consider tightening it given its volatility and decay.
No new buys today - hold and watch.
